# Impronta Arredi — Interior Design & General Contractor

> Impronta Arredi is an Italian general contractor specializing in luxury turnkey interior design and renovations.
> We serve high-end clients in Italy and internationally, offering a single point of contact for the entire project.

## Who We Are
Impronta Arredi is a Milan-based general contractor providing complete turnkey solutions for luxury interior projects. We manage every phase — from concept design to final certification — under one roof with a single dedicated project manager.

## Our 6 Turnkey Services
1. **Interior Design & Planning** — Concept development, functional layouts, photorealistic 3D renders, executive design
2. **Complete Renovation** — Structural work, masonry, flooring, suspended ceilings, custom finishes
3. **Electrical & Special Systems** — Home automation (domotics), lighting design, CCTV, fire safety
4. **Plumbing & HVAC** — Underfloor heating, VMC ventilation, cooling, water systems
5. **Custom Furniture & Furnishing** — Bespoke furniture, lighting, textiles, art curation, accessories
6. **Certifications & Compliance** — Building permits, energy certification (APE), system compliance, cadastral updates

## Key Advantages
- **Single Point of Contact** — One project manager coordinates architects, craftsmen, installers, suppliers
- **20+ Years Experience** — Over 500 projects completed
- **Zero Coordination Issues** — Centralized planning eliminates communication gaps
- **Guaranteed Timelines** — Project scheduling with contractual deadlines
- **Transparent Budget** — All-inclusive pricing with no hidden costs
- **100% Certified** — Full documentation and compliance for every system

## Target Projects
- Luxury residential apartments and penthouses
- Executive offices and corporate headquarters
- Boutique hotels and hospitality venues
- High-end retail stores and luxury brand spaces
- International clients seeking Italian design excellence

## Languages
We serve clients in three languages:
- **Italiano** (native)
- **English** (fluent)
- **中文 / Chinese** (available for Chinese-speaking clients and investors)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does "turnkey" mean?
Turnkey (chiavi in mano) means we handle everything — design, renovation, systems, furniture, and certifications. You receive the completed project ready to use, without managing multiple contractors.

### How long does a full renovation take?
A medium-sized apartment typically takes 3-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation and commit to respecting it through centralized project management.

### Do you work outside Milan?
Our headquarters is in Milan, but we operate throughout Italy and internationally. We have completed projects in Rome, Florence, Lake Como, the Amalfi Coast, and several European capitals.

### Can I see a 3D preview of my project?
Yes. We create photorealistic 3D renders that let you visualize every detail before construction begins. This ensures the final result matches your expectations exactly.

### How does pricing work?
We offer a free initial consultation with an on-site survey. After understanding your needs, we prepare a detailed, transparent quote. The budget is all-inclusive: labor, materials, furniture, and certifications — no surprises.

### What types of certifications do you provide?
We handle all required certifications: electrical and plumbing system compliance, fire safety, APE energy certification, cadastral updates, and building permits. Every project is delivered fully certified and documented.

### Do you source Italian artisanal materials?
Yes. We work with selected Italian artisans and premium suppliers for marble, wood, textiles, and custom metalwork. Every material is chosen for quality, durability, and aesthetic coherence with the design concept.

### Can you renovate a boutique hotel?
Absolutely. We specialize in hospitality projects including boutique hotels, luxury B&Bs, and high-end residences. We manage the entire process from concept to furniture, including compliance with hospitality regulations.

## Dedicated FAQ Page
We have a comprehensive FAQ page at https://www.improntarredi.it/faq.html covering:
- **Services & Expertise** — Turnkey service details, project types, interior design, home automation, luxury brands
- **Costs & Quotes** — Pricing per sqm (€800-€3,000+), binding quotes, payment methods, Italian tax bonuses
- **Timelines & Process** — 3-6 months apartments, 6-12 months villas/hotels, weekly updates, 3-phase process
- **Materials & Quality** — Italian marbles, premium woods, sustainable options, 10-year structural warranty
- **International** — Milan HQ but operating in London, Paris, New York, Dubai; multilingual team (IT/EN/CN)
- **Warranties & Safety** — Professional insurance, NDA confidentiality, certified workers, satisfaction guarantee

## Process (6 Phases)
1. **Consultation** — Free on-site survey, requirements analysis, preliminary concept
2. **Design** — Interior design, 3D renders, material selection, detailed planning
3. **Permits** — Building permits, structural calculations, regulatory compliance
4. **Construction** — Demolition, masonry, systems installation, finishes
5. **Furnishing** — Custom furniture production, delivery, installation, styling
6. **Handover** — Final inspection, certifications, documentation, key delivery

- **Email:** info@improntarredi.it
- **Phone:** +39 000 0000000
- **Location:** Milan, Italy (serving all of Italy and international projects)
- **Languages:** Italian, English, Chinese
